description:
Implement `hx-list` and `hx-list-item` (T2 tier) — 4/6 enterprise libraries ship this. Styled list container with rich list items.

**Files to create** in `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-list/`:
- `index.ts`, `hx-list.ts`, `hx-list.styles.ts`, `hx-list.stories.ts`, `hx-list.test.ts`

**`hx-list` props:** `variant` (`plain`|`bulleted`|`numbered`|`interactive`), `divided` (boolean — dividers between items)

**`hx-list-item` props:** `disabled` (boolean), `selected` (boolean), `href` (string — makes item a link), `value` (string)

**Slots on `hx-list-item`:** default (label), `prefix` (icon/avatar), `suffix` (icon/badge/text), `description` (secondary text)

**Events:** `hx-select` on `hx-list` when item clicked (interactive mode), `hx-list-item-click` on item

**CSS Parts:** `hx-list`: `base`; `hx-list-item`: `base`, `prefix`, `label`, `description`, `suffix`

**ARIA:** Interactive variant: `hx-list` gets `role="listbox"`, items get `role="option"` with `aria-selected`. Plain/bulleted: `role="list"` + `role="listitem"`.

**Quality gates:** type-check zero errors, all tests, axe-core zero violations (both interactive and plain modes), Storybook all variants, CEM accurate, bundle < 4KB.

Register `hx-list` and `hx-list-item` in `packages/hx-library/src/index.ts` and `packages/hx-library/vite.config.ts`.
title: IMPLEMENT: hx-list — T2 List/List Item Component
